question: How much of the Pantanal wetlands in Brazil were affected by wildfires by June 2024?
ground_truth: By June 2024, wildfires had affected 32,000 hectares (79,000 acres) of the Pantanal wetlands in Brazil.
event_desc: 10 June  2024 Brazil wildfires 32,000 hectares (79,000 acres) of tropical wetland in the Pantanal are affected, a 935% increase in the number of fires over the same period last year. A state of emergency is subsequently declared in the region on 25 June.
